title: [MODS SUPPORTED] StoryAnvil's Universal ore highlights
description: Ore highlights compatible with create, mekanism, ad astra and others
body:
This resourcepack features ore borders for **a lot of mods** besides minecraft.

Full list of available mods located in [StoryAnvil wiki](https://storyanvil.github.io/page?wiki=projects/oreHighlighter).

But here is some of them:
- Create
- Mekanism
- Mekanism: Ad astra ores
- Oritech
- TConstruct
- Ad astra
- Palladium
- Immersive Engineering
- Thermal Foundation
